fields.label: Snapshot Date
fields.description: Not unique at the DocType level - validate() only blocks a second SUBMITTED snapshot on the same date, so a cancelled snapshot can be re-approved on that date.

fields.label: Planning Done On
fields.description: Document submission datetime - set on submit (when the weekly planning was approved). Fieldname kept as approved_on (referenced by sales_order_hooks).

fields.label: Submitted By
fields.description: User who submitted (approved) the snapshot - set automatically on submit. Fieldname kept as approved_by.

fields.label: View
fields.description: Detailed = per Sales Order line. Consolidated = one row per Item Code; editing Committed Prodn there allocates back to the SO lines by Sales Order Date priority. Switching the view never changes data.

fields.label: Hide Zero Rows
fields.description: Client-side view filter - hides rows with Committed Prodn = 0 (per line in Detailed, per item in Consolidated). Does not change the data.

fields.label: Items (Detailed)
fields.description: The single source of truth (one row per Sales Order line). Populated as a DRAFT from open Sales Orders; adjust Committed Prodn line-wise (or via the Consolidated view), then Submit to approve. To re-do an approved snapshot, cancel + amend.
